text: Gleason grading system for adenocarcinoma of the prostate 1. Lobular masses, uniform small glands, no invasion 2. Lobular masses, iregular glands, ‘broad front' invasion, = cribriform pattern 3. Iregular glands, infiltrative invasion, cribiforn pattern, papillary pattern 4. Sheets of large cells with pale cytoplasm, infiltrative invasion, + glands (like renal cell carcinoma) 5. Sheets of anaplastic cells, = foci of glands (like small cell carcinoma) Cavalli F, Hansen H, Kaye S, editors. Textbook of Medical Oncology. London: Martin Dunitz Ltd; 1997. p. 185.
